questions.question: Consider a dataset with 5 features and 10 samples. What is the main advantage of using Principal Component Analysis (PCA) for dimensionality reduction in this case?
Find the eigenvector and eigenvalue for the given covariance matrix. What does this represent in the context of PCA?
questions.hint: Optional hint provided on the day of examination

questions.question: Suppose we have a dataset with two features, X and Y. Applying PCA to this dataset reduces the dimensionality to one. What does this imply about the relationship between the two original features?
